0.content:
# 🤖 Developers AI Usage

Visão geral de uso de IA generativa pelos devs (GitHub Copilot Chat via OpenTelemetry nativo do VS Code) — custo, performance, adoção e qualidade em um único dashboard.

**Fonte:** `service.name == "copilot-chat"` · Notebook de origem: [copilot-chat-observability](../notebooks/copilot-chat-observability.md)

11.title: Chats
11.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter startsWith(span.name, "chat ")
| summarize chats = count()

12.title: Sessões
12.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.conversation.id)
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(gen_ai.conversation.id)

13.title: Devs ativos
13.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter isNotNull(user.email)
| summarize devs = countDistinct(user.email)

14.title: Tool calls
14.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter startsWith(span.name, "execute_tool ")
| summarize tools = count()

15.title: Custo estimado (USD)

20.content:
## 💰 FinOps — custo e tokens

> Custo é **estimado** via pricing hardcoded na DQL — ajustar conforme contrato Copilot Business/Enterprise.

21.title: 💰 Custo por modelo (24h)
21.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| fieldsAdd inp = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| fieldsAdd out = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| fieldsAdd cost_usd =
    if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "opus"),
       (inp * 0.000015) + (out * 0.000075),
    else: if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "mini"),
       (inp * 0.00000015) + (out * 0.0000006),
    else: if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "claude"),
       (inp * 0.000003) + (out * 0.000015),
    else: if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "gpt-4o"),
       (inp * 0.0000025) + (out * 0.00001),
    else: (inp * 0.000002) + (out * 0.00001)))))
| summarize cost = sum(cost_usd),
            input_tokens = sum(inp),
            output_tokens = sum(out),
            requests = count()
  by gen_ai.request.model
| sort cost desc

22.title: 💰 Custo por dev (top 20, 24h)
22.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter isNotNull(user.email) and isNotNull(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| fieldsAdd inp = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| fieldsAdd out = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| fieldsAdd cost_usd =
    if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "opus"),
       (inp * 0.000015) + (out * 0.000075),
    else: if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "mini"),
       (inp * 0.00000015) + (out * 0.0000006),
    else: if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "claude"),
       (inp * 0.000003) + (out * 0.000015),
    else: (inp * 0.0000025) + (out * 0.00001))))
| summarize cost = sum(cost_usd),
            chats = count(),
            tokens = sum(inp + out)
  by dev = coalesce(user.email, user.name), user.team
| sort cost desc
| limit 20

23.title: 💰 Custo por time (7 dias)
23.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter isNotNull(user.team) and isNotNull(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| fieldsAdd inp = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens)
| fieldsAdd out = toDouble(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)
| fieldsAdd cost_usd =
    if(contains(gen_ai.request.model, "mini"),
       (inp * 0.00000015) + (out * 0.0000006),
    else: (inp * 0.0000025) + (out * 0.00001))
| summarize cost = sum(cost_usd),
            devs = countDistinct(user.email),
            chats = count()
  by user.team
| sort cost desc

31.title: ⏱️ Latência P50/P95/P99 por modelo (24h)
31.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter startsWith(span.name, "chat ")
| fieldsAdd dur_ms = duration / 1000000
| summarize p50 = percentile(dur_ms, 50),
            p95 = percentile(dur_ms, 95),
            p99 = percentile(dur_ms, 99),
            requests = count()
  by gen_ai.request.model
| sort p95 desc

32.title: ❌ Taxa de erro por modelo (24h)
32.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter startsWith(span.name, "chat ")
| summarize total = count(),
            errors = countIf(status == "ERROR")
  by gen_ai.request.model
| fieldsAdd error_rate = round(toDouble(errors) / toDouble(total) * 100, 2)
| sort error_rate desc

33.title: 📈 Chats ao longo do tempo por modelo (6h)
33.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter startsWith(span.name, "chat ")
| makeTimeseries chats = count(), by:{gen_ai.request.model}, interval:5m

41.title: 🧠 Modelos mais usados (7 dias)
41.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter startsWith(span.name, "chat ")
| summarize chats = count(),
            devs = countDistinct(user.email),
            tokens = sum(toLong(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens) + toLong(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens))
  by gen_ai.request.model
| sort chats desc

42.title: 🔧 Ferramentas mais invocadas (24h)
42.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter startsWith(span.name, "execute_tool ")
| fieldsAdd tool_name = replaceString(span.name, "execute_tool ", "")
| fieldsAdd dur_ms = duration / 1000000
| summarize calls = count(),
            avg_ms = avg(dur_ms),
            errors = countIf(status == "ERROR")
  by tool_name
| sort calls desc
| limit 15

43.title: 🏆 Top 10 devs por consumo (7 dias)
43.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter startsWith(span.name, "chat ")
| filter isNotNull(user.email)
| summarize chats = count(),
            tokens = sum(toLong(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens) + toLong(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens)),
            sessions = countDistinct(gen_ai.conversation.id)
  by user.email, user.name, user.team
| sort chats desc
| limit 10

44.title: 🕸️ Agents / sub-agents ativos (24h)
44.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "copilot-chat"
| filter isNotNull(gen_ai.agent.name)
| summarize chats = count(),
            tokens = sum(toLong(gen_ai.usage.input_tokens) + toLong(gen_ai.usage.output_tokens))
  by gen_ai.agent.name
| sort chats desc

50.content:
## 🧪 Evaluations — qualidade das respostas (dt-evals)

> Opcional, requer [`dt-evals`](https://github.com/dynatrace-oss/dt-evals) rodando. Ver [docs/07-evaluations.md](../docs/07-evaluations.md).

51.title: ✅ Pass rate por métrica (24h)
51.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "gen_ai.evaluation.result"
| summarize evaluations = count(),
            pass_rate = countIf(gen_ai.evaluation.score.label == "pass") * 100.0 / count(),
            avg_score = avg(gen_ai.evaluation.score.value)
  by gen_ai.evaluation.name
| sort pass_rate asc

90.content:
## 🔧 Métricas extraídas via OpenPipeline

A regra de **Metric extraction** em `Process and contextualize → OpenPipeline → Spans` já grava `input_tokens`, `output_tokens` e `total_tokens_input` (+ uma cópia) como métricas nativas a partir de `gen_ai.usage.*`. Isso permite trocar os `fetch spans` acima por `timeseries` sobre a métrica (mais barato, sem reprocessar o payload do span a cada consulta).

**⚠️ Pendência conhecida:** confira a condição de cada regra antes de usar essas métricas em produção — `total_tokens_input` está atualmente com a mesma condição de `output_tokens`, e há uma regra duplicada (`total_tokens_input - Copy`). Ajustar nomes/condições no OpenPipeline antes de trocar os tiles acima por `timeseries`.

99.content:
---

### 📖 Como esses dados chegam aqui

1. **VS Code Copilot Chat** emite OTel spans (`invoke_agent`, `chat`, `execute_tool`)
2. Spans são enviados via OTLP HTTP para um **OTel Collector**
3. Collector adiciona autenticação e forwarda para o **Dynatrace**
4. **OpenPipeline** processa e extrai métricas de token a partir dos spans
5. Este dashboard consulta via DQL — (Opcional) **dt-evals** grava scores de qualidade como bizevents

Documentação: [Monitor agent usage with OpenTelemetry (VS Code Docs)](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/agents/guides/monitoring-agents) · [AI settings reference](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/agents/reference/ai-settings) · [dt-evals (GitHub)](https://github.com/dynatrace-oss/dt-evals)
